summary: Using the provided preflight artifact as live GitHub state, #61741 is the safest open replacement for closed representative #61917. Planned closeouts are limited to #65285 and #69920 as symptom-only duplicates of #61741; #65983 stays open as a related orphan-process variant, and the #62754/#63220 abort-timeout pair is left for human review. No fix artifact is emitted because fix work is blocked by job policy and current-main behavior could not be proven from the provided data.

needs_human: Could not prove whether current openclaw/main already contains a fix because no target checkout was provided and autonomous fix work is blocked by job policy.
